hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Iterate through each character in the ISBN string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Skip dashes - they don't affect the calculation

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a multiplier that starts at 10 and decreases by 1 for each digit

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Handle 'X' specially - it represents 10 and is only valid as the last digit

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: After processing all characters, check that the multiplier is 0 (meaning exactly 10 digits were found)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The ISBN is valid if the total sum is divisible by 11
